  kotlinMinusEqualTok,      ## -=

  kotlinDoubleColonTok,     ## ::

KotlinNode = distinct TSNode
KotlinParser = distinct PtsParser

Procs

proc kind(node: KotlinNode): KotlinNodeKind {...}{.noSideEffect, raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect].}
proc tsNodeType(node: KotlinNode): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc newKotlinParser(): KotlinParser {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc parseString(parser: KotlinParser; str: string): KotlinNode {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
proc parseKotlinString(str: string): KotlinNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc isNil(node: KotlinNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc treeRepr(mainNode: KotlinNode; instr: string; withUnnamed: bool = false): string {...}{.
    raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect].}
